title: GeoPura Closes Landmark Debt Funding Round, Pioneering Green Hydrogen Finance in the UK
content: GeoPura, a global leader in zero emission power, proudly announces the successful completion of its inaugural debt funding round, securing Â£22 million to fund renewable fuel infrastructure and support the clean energy transition. This ground-breaking achievement marks the first major asset-backed debt funding announcement by a green hydrogen company in the UK.
author: Analysts Account
